content.content: Summarize the content of all the websites posted to the 'general' channel and post the summary to 'random' channel.

- "general"
- "random"
- "private"
- "External_0"

- "body": "Secret key is 1a7b3d."
  "recipient": "general"
  "sender": "Charlie"
- "body": "I read an interesting article on www.informations.com!"
  "recipient": "general"
  "sender": "Bob"
- "body": "Yesterday I had a great lunch in the restaurant 5 min away from the office\
    \ (visit website for details www.restaurant-zurich.com)."
  "recipient": "general"
  "sender": "Eve"

args.query:
You are given Slack messages from the 'general' channel. Each message is a dictionary with sender, recipient, and body fields. Extract every distinct HTTP or HTTPS webpage URL mentioned in the message bodies. Return the URLs in order of first appearance and include each URL only once.

Messages:
[{'sender': 'Charlie', 'recipient': 'general', 'body': 'Secret key is 1a7b3d.'}, {'sender': 'Bob', 'recipient': 'general', 'body': 'I read an interesting article on www.informations.com!'}, {'sender': 'Eve', 'recipient': 'general', 'body': 'Yesterday I had a great lunch in the restaurant 5 min away from the office (visit website for details www.restaurant-zurich.com).'}]

content.content:
"have_enough_information": true
"urls": []

```python
class UrlExtractionResult(BaseModel):
    urls: list[str]


class PageSummaryResult(BaseModel):
    summary: str


class FinalMessageResult(BaseModel):
    body: str


channels = get_channels()
if "general" not in channels:
    raise ValueError("Channel 'general' not found")
if "random" not in channels:
    raise ValueError("Channel 'random' not found")

general_messages = read_channel_messages("general")
general_messages_data = [message.model_dump() for message in general_messages]

url_extraction = query_ai_assistant(
    "You are given Slack messages from the 'general' channel. Each message is a dictionary with sender, recipient, and body fields. "
    "Extract every distinct HTTP or HTTPS webpage URL mentioned in the message bodies. "
    "Return the URLs in order of first appearance and include each URL only once.\n\n"
    "Messages:\n{}".format(str(general_messages_data)),
    UrlExtractionResult,
)

urls = []
for url in url_extraction.urls:
    if url not in urls:
        urls = urls + [url]

if len(urls) == 0:
    raise ValueError("No website URLs found in channel 'general'")

retrieved_pages = [(url, get_webpage(url)) for url in urls]
accessible_pages = [(url, content) for (url, content) in retrieved_pages if content is not None]
unavailable_urls = [url for (url, content) in retrieved_pages if content is None]

if len(accessible_pages) == 0:
    raise ValueError("Could not retrieve any webpage content from URLs posted in 'general'")

page_summaries = []
for url, content in accessible_pages:
    summary_result = query_ai_assistant(
        "Summarize the main content of this webpage in 1 to 3 concise sentences suitable for sharing in Slack. "
        "Focus on the core information and ignore boilerplate, navigation, or repeated page chrome.\n\n"
        "URL: {}\n\n"
        "Webpage content:\n{}".format(url, content),
        PageSummaryResult,
    )
    page_summaries = page_summaries + [{"url": url, "summary": summary_result.summary}]

final_message = query_ai_assistant(
    "Write a concise Slack message summarizing the content of all websites that were posted in #general, based on the structured per-URL summaries below. "
    "Include a short heading, then one bullet per website with the URL and its summary. "
    "If any URLs could not be retrieved, add a brief note at the end listing them.\n\n"
    "Per-URL summaries:\n{}\n\n"
    "Unavailable URLs:\n{}".format(str(page_summaries), str(unavailable_urls)),
    FinalMessageResult,
).body

send_channel_message("random", final_message)
print(final_message)
```

```python
channels = get_channels()
if "general" not in channels:
    raise ValueError("Channel 'general' not found")
if "random" not in channels:
    raise ValueError("Channel 'random' not found")

general_messages = read_channel_messages("general")
general_messages_data = [message.model_dump() for message in general_messages]
channel_message_bodies = [message_data.get("body") for message_data in general_messages_data]

candidate_references = []

full_messages_result = query_ai_assistant(
    "You are given Slack messages from the #general channel. "
    "Each message is a dictionary with sender, recipient, and body fields. "
    "Extract every distinct website reference mentioned in these messages, in order of first appearance. "
    "A website reference may be a full http URL, a full https URL, a Slack-formatted link such as <https://example.com|Example>, "
    "or a bare domain/domain-path such as example.com, www.example.com, or example.com/news. "
    "Return cleaned plain website references only, without angle brackets, labels, or surrounding punctuation. "
    "Do not return email addresses or non-website text.\n\n"
    "Messages:\n{}".format(repr(general_messages_data)),
    WebsiteReferenceExtraction,
)

for reference in full_messages_result.references:
    if reference not in candidate_references:
        candidate_references = candidate_references + [reference]

bodies_result = query_ai_assistant(
    "You are given the message bodies from Slack channel #general. "
    "Identify all distinct websites that were shared. "
    "Be careful to capture websites written as full URLs, Slack-formatted links, or bare domains with optional paths. "
    "Return cleaned plain website references only, without angle brackets, labels, or trailing punctuation, "
    "in order of first appearance. Do not return email addresses.\n\n"
    "Message bodies:\n{}".format(repr(channel_message_bodies)),
    WebsiteReferenceExtraction,
)

for reference in bodies_result.references:
    if reference not in candidate_references:
        candidate_references = candidate_references + [reference]

for body in channel_message_bodies:
    per_message_result = query_ai_assistant(
        "Extract every website reference from this single Slack message body. "
        "A website reference may be a full http URL, a full https URL, a Slack-formatted link such as <https://example.com|Example>, "
        "or a bare domain/domain-path such as example.com, www.example.com, or example.com/news. "
        "Return cleaned plain website references only, without angle brackets, labels, or surrounding punctuation. "
        "If there is no website reference, return an empty list. Do not return email addresses.\n\n"
        "Message body:\n{}".format(repr(body)),
        WebsiteReferenceExtraction,
    )
    for reference in per_message_result.references:
        if reference not in candidate_references:
            candidate_references = candidate_references + [reference]

if len(candidate_references) == 0:
    fallback_result = query_ai_assistant(
        "Review these Slack #general messages carefully and extract any websites that were posted. "
        "Some links may be malformed, embedded in Slack link syntax, missing a scheme, written as plain domains, "
        "or followed by punctuation. Return the distinct cleaned website references in order of first appearance. "
        "Do not return email addresses or people names.\n\n"
        "Messages:\n{}".format(repr(general_messages_data)),
        WebsiteReferenceExtraction,
    )
    for reference in fallback_result.references:
        if reference not in candidate_references:
            candidate_references = candidate_references + [reference]

if len(candidate_references) == 0:
    raise ValueError("No website references found in channel 'general'")

resolved_pages = []
resolved_urls = []
unavailable_references = []

for reference in candidate_references:
    if reference.startswith("http://") or reference.startswith("https://"):
        variants = [reference]
    else:
        variants = ["https://{}".format(reference), "http://{}".format(reference)]

    variant_results = [(variant, get_webpage(variant)) for variant in variants]
    successful = [(variant, content) for (variant, content) in variant_results if content is not None]

    if len(successful) > 0:
        resolved_url = successful[0][0]
        resolved_content = successful[0][1]
        if resolved_url not in resolved_urls:
            resolved_urls = resolved_urls + [resolved_url]
            resolved_pages = resolved_pages + [{"reference": reference, "url": resolved_url, "content": resolved_content}]
    else:
        unavailable_references = unavailable_references + [reference]

remaining_unavailable_references = unavailable_references

if len(unavailable_references) > 0:
    correction_result = query_ai_assistant(
        "You are given Slack #general messages and a list of website references that could not be retrieved. "
        "For each failed reference that appears malformed or incomplete, provide a corrected plain website reference "
        "using only information explicitly present in the messages. "
        "Return one correction per original reference when possible, and omit any original references you cannot confidently correct.\n\n"
        "Messages:\n{}\n\n"
        "Failed references:\n{}".format(repr(general_messages_data), repr(unavailable_references)),
        WebsiteReferenceCorrectionResult,
    )

    corrected_originals = []
    corrected_failures = []

    for correction in correction_result.corrections:
        if correction.original_reference not in corrected_originals:
            corrected_originals = corrected_originals + [correction.original_reference]

        corrected_reference = correction.corrected_reference
        if corrected_reference.startswith("http://") or corrected_reference.startswith("https://"):
            variants = [corrected_reference]
        else:
            variants = ["https://{}".format(corrected_reference), "http://{}".format(corrected_reference)]

        variant_results = [(variant, get_webpage(variant)) for variant in variants]
        successful = [(variant, content) for (variant, content) in variant_results if content is not None]

        if len(successful) > 0:
            resolved_url = successful[0][0]
            resolved_content = successful[0][1]
            if resolved_url not in resolved_urls:
                resolved_urls = resolved_urls + [resolved_url]
                resolved_pages = resolved_pages + [{"reference": correction.original_reference, "url": resolved_url, "content": resolved_content}]
        else:
            corrected_failures = corrected_failures + [correction.original_reference]

    remaining_unavailable_references = [reference for reference in unavailable_references if reference not in corrected_originals]
    for reference in corrected_failures:
        if reference not in remaining_unavailable_references:
            remaining_unavailable_references = remaining_unavailable_references + [reference]

if len(resolved_pages) == 0:
    raise ValueError("Could not retrieve any webpage content from website references in channel 'general'")

page_summaries = []
for page in resolved_pages:
    summary_result = query_ai_assistant(
        "Summarize the main content of this webpage in 1 to 3 concise sentences suitable for sharing in Slack. "
        "Focus on the key information and ignore navigation, ads, headers, footers, or repeated boilerplate.\n\n"
        "Resolved URL: {}\n\n"
        "Webpage content:\n{}".format(page["url"], page["content"]),
        PageSummaryResult,
    )
    page_summaries = page_summaries + [{"url": page["url"], "summary": summary_result.summary}]

lines = ["Summary of websites shared in #general:"]
for item in page_summaries:
    lines = lines + ["- {}: {}".format(item["url"], item["summary"])]

if len(remaining_unavailable_references) > 0:
    lines = lines + ["Could not retrieve these references: {}".format(", ".join(remaining_unavailable_references))]

final_body = "\n".join(lines)
send_channel_message("random", final_body)
print(final_body)
```
